options.name: -idx_pair
options.description: <idx pair list if the files are copied from idx db>

options.name: -inputs
options.description: <full directory of the library file to be imported>

options.name: -libs
options.description: <specify whether the input file is a library file or not>

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: <rc corner if the type is qrc_tech>

options.name: -tag
options.description: <Specifies tag of a saved file. This option is mutual exclusive with -libs

options.name: -type
options.description: <type of library file : lib lef qrc_tech qrc_conf>
